title: Better Copper Recycling
description: Recycle copper items and blocks (plus their variants) into copper nuggets and ingots
body:
Minecraft lets you recycle gold and iron, so why not copper? Or, if you're on 1.21.9, why should you only get a nugget for smelting a whole chestplate? This pack lets you smelt or blast the following copper items, blocks and their variants* into ingots:

- Doors (1.21+)
- Trapdoors (1.21+)
- Grates (1.21+)
- Cut blocks
- Cut stairs
- Chiseled blocks (1.21+)
- Lightning rods
- Spyglasses
- Copper chests (1.21.9+)
- Copper armor (1.21.9+)
- Copper horse armor (1.21.9+)

And, for those using 1.21.9+, smelt or blast these items and their variants* into copper nuggets:
- Copper chains
- Copper tools
- Copper bars
- Copper lanterns

*Includes waxed and unwaxed shiny, exposed, weathered and oxidized blocks and items.

### notblue's Metallurgy Packs
- [Anvil Repair](https://modrinth.com/datapack/anvil-repair)
- [Copper Cutting](https://modrinth.com/datapack/copper-cutting)

- [Cheaper Clocks](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cheaper-clocks)
- [Better Gold Recycling](https://modrinth.com/datapack/better-gold-recycling)
- [Cheaper Compasses](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cheaper-compasses)
- [Better Iron Recycling](https://modrinth.com/datapack/better-iron-recycling)
